api: EZOfficeInventory API v1 (https://<subdomain>.ezofficeinventory.com, .api-suffixed endpoints, token header auth)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every documented v1 .api endpoint (https://ezo.io/ezofficeinventory/developers/) is enumerated below, covered by a stream/write or excluded with a specific reason. EZOfficeInventory also publishes a newer, differently-authenticated /api/v2/ surface (Bearer auth, used by the community ezoff Python package) that is NOT the documented v1 API this bundle targets; it is out of scope as a distinct, incompatible auth/versioning surface, not enumerated here.

excluded.reason: single-asset detail is already covered by paginated list stream 'assets'; no distinct fields returned
irreversible asset deletion; excluded from this Pass B expansion pending a dedicated approval/risk review
compound state-transition action (checkout with location/member/duration/custom-field payload); not a plain create/update mutation the writes.json dialect models as a single-resource form POST/PUT
compound state-transition action (checkin with location/comments/custom-field payload); same shape limitation as checkout
per-asset checkin/checkout history sub-resource; would require a fan_out-per-asset-id read this Pass B does not add for the history family
narrow single-purpose lifecycle action (extend an existing checkout duration), not a create/update of a resource
lifecycle state-transition action distinct from update_asset's field-update shape
lifecycle state-transition action distinct from update_asset's field-update shape
narrow single-field GPS update sub-action; covered field-for-field by update_asset for every other asset attribute

per-asset reservation calendar sub-resource; reservations are a distinct booking subsystem out of scope for this expansion
